items.title: An Arkansas man accused of killing his daughter's alleged abuser wins GOP sheriff's nomination

items.title: US soldiers who died in the Iran war remembered for their service and devotion to their families
items.description: Four of the six U.S. soldiers killed in the Iran war have been identified by the Pentagon as members of the Army Reserve
